title: Aether Telemetry Record
description: Standardized link-state reporting format for Aether control-plane coordination.

link_id.description: Stable, operator-defined link identifier. Must be consistent across restarts.

latency_ms.description: Round-trip latency in milliseconds. Optional; missing value indicates unknown.

capacity_mbps.description: Link-level aggregate capacity in Mbps. Optional.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this telemetry was observed.

source_id.description: Identifier of the telemetry source (device, probe, or provider).
